envelope_defaults.human_readable_summary: Dandelion maps the territory. Admins approve the map. Foundation governs what can happen inside the map. DMWs scope what can be remembered. Digital Twins operate within the approved terrain.
envelope_defaults.model_usage_notes: Reviews are PROPOSED_NOT_REVIEWED. User must confirm own role; admin approves Twin capability activation. No workforce-scoring inferences during review.

items.name: Role Map Governance Review
items.description: Surfaces D3 Role Map recommendation regions for user confirmation + admin governance review. Twin day-one capabilities require admin policy approval. Sensitive-scope exclusions remain absolute.
items.human_readable_summary: User confirms own role match; admin approves Twin capability activation. Sensitive scopes excluded at intake stay excluded.
items.model_usage_notes: Role-template match requires user confirmation before admin can approve capabilities. Wave 2.1 DEEP roles (6 of 21) get straightforward APPROVE paths; out-of-catalog roles get DEFER_FOR_MORE_INFO until role-depth substrate covers them.
escalation_path: Otzar Administrator → Founder (for sensitive-scope expansions only)
DMW_scope_implications: Approved Role Map bounds Role-scoped DMW memory per Wave 2.1 §25
Sensitive scopes excluded at intake remain excluded at DMW activation
Twin day-one capabilities map to allowed DMW categories per OOTB role-depth
governance_review_points: User confirms role before Twin activation
Admin approves every Role Map region before capability lights up
No workforce-scoring inferences from role + responsibility data during review
safe_defaults: OOTB role-depth defaults as starter priors
